commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: How then? What comfort shall there be? Therefore watch, and remember, that by the space of three years I ceased not to warn every one night and day with tears.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: That there are heresies, this is the cause, and no other than this. Then comes also consolation. But if He purchased it with His own blood, He will assuredly stand forward in its defence. Night and day, he says, I cease not to warn with tears.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
